customHandlers.hongguoListHandler: function(ctx) { let apiUrl = `https://api.cenguigui.cn/api/duanju/api.php?type=search&name=&page=${ctx.pg || 1}`; let resp = req(apiUrl); let content = resp.text ? resp.text() : (typeof resp === 'string' ? resp : ''); let json = JSON.parse(content); let list = json.data || []; return list.map(item => ({ vod_id: `###${item.book_id}###${item.book_name}`, vod_name: item.book_name, vod_pic: item.book_pic || '' })); }
customHandlers.hongguoDetailHandler: function(ctx) { let parts = ctx.vodId.split('###'); let bookId = parts[1]; let title = parts[2]; if (!bookId) return { list: [] }; let apiUrl = `https://api.cenguigui.cn/api/duanju/api.php?type=detail&book_id=${bookId}`; let resp = req(apiUrl); let content = resp.text ? resp.text() : (typeof resp === 'string' ? resp : ''); let json = JSON.parse(content); let videoArr = json.data || []; let videoList = []; for (let i = 0; i < videoArr.length; i++) { let video = videoArr[i]; let sortName = video.sort || ('第' + (i+1) + '集'); videoList.push(`${sortName}$${video.video_id}`); } let vod = { vod_id: ctx.vodId, vod_name: title, vod_play_from: '红果短剧', vod_play_url: videoList.join('#') }; return { list: [vod] }; }
customHandlers.hongguoPlayHandler: function(ctx) { let videoId = ctx.id; let apiUrl = `https://api.cenguigui.cn/api/duanju/api.php?type=video&video_id=${videoId}`; let resp = req(apiUrl); let content = resp.text ? resp.text() : (typeof resp === 'string' ? resp : ''); let json = JSON.parse(content); let playUrl = json.url || json.data || ''; return { parse: 0, playUrl: '', url: playUrl }; }
